summary: Completed testing of Customer Cash Out workflow feature. All 7 backend tests pass, all frontend UI tests pass. Feature creates expense record and automatically generates invoice when customers borrow money.
passed_tests: BACKEND TESTS (7/7 passed):
- POST /expenses/customer-cashout without customer returns 400 with 'Customer is required for cash out'
- POST /expenses/customer-cashout with invalid customer returns 404 with 'Customer not found'
- POST /expenses/customer-cashout with valid data creates expense AND invoice
- Expense has category='Customer Cash Out', expense_type='customer_cashout', linked_invoice_number set
- Invoice is created with correct amount and customer details
- GET /expenses shows customer cash out expenses with customer_name and linked_invoice_number fields
- GET /expenses?category=Customer%20Cash%20Out filter works correctly
FRONTEND TESTS:
- Customer Cash Out button exists on Accounting page with data-testid='cashout-btn'
- Button has blue styling (border-blue-300, text-blue-700) and Banknote icon
- Clicking button opens Customer Cash Out dialog
- Dialog has blue info banner explaining workflow

- Dialog fields: Customer dropdown (data-testid='cashout-customer'), Amount (data-testid='cashout-amount'), Date, Purpose/Description (data-testid='cashout-description'), Notes (data-testid='cashout-notes'), Payment Method, Reference #, Invoice Due Date, Payment Terms
- 'Release Cash & Create Invoice' button (data-testid='save-cashout-btn')
- Validation: Submitting without customer shows error toast 'Please select a customer'
- Validation: Submitting without amount shows error toast
- Successful submission shows success toast with invoice number
- Expense displays in table with 'Customer Cash Out' category badge (blue, with banknote icon)
- Expense shows 'Loaned to: CustomerName' text in blue
- Expense shows linked invoice number (e.g., 'Invoice: INV-20260219-0032')
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_customer_cashout.py - Created comprehensive backend tests for Customer Cash Out workflow

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI features tested and working

seed_data_creation: Created test cash out expenses during testing (TEST_UI prefixed for easy identification)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer Cash Out workflow fully implemented and tested. This feature is similar to Farm Expense - both create an expense and automatically generate an invoice. Key differences: Cash Out uses blue theme (Farm Expense uses amber), Cash Out shows 'Loaned to:' (Farm Expense shows 'Billed to:'). Test credentials: admin/admin123. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_customer_cashout.py.
